_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: the Nf1 mice (n = 6 mice) showed 124.5% ±4.5% potentiation... whereas WT mice (n = 6 mice) showed 148.6% ±4.1%
details: Showed deficient CA1 LTP - 124.5% ±4.5% potentiation between 40-50 min after tetanus compared to 148.6% ±4.1% in WT mice
